initial_test_output:
Server listening on port 8080
Baseline: listeners=1, heap=4.04MB
After 500 requests: listeners=501, heap=6.02MB
FAIL: Listener count grew to 501 (expected <= 10)
      Event listeners are being registered per-request and never removed

cmd:
sed -i "/this\.eventBus\.on('data:validated'/,/});/d" /app/app/processor.js
sed -i "/this\.eventBus\.on('data:error'/,/});/d" /app/app/processor.js
sed -i "/constructor(eventBus) {/a \    this.eventBus.on('data:validated', (validatedData) => { this._handleValidated(validatedData); });\n    this.eventBus.on('data:error', (err) => { console.error(\`Processing error: \${err.message}\`); });" /app/app/processor.js
sed -i "s/_handleValidated(validatedData, originalData)/_handleValidated(validatedData
